verses.text: Leilak ka tun'kim khit uh ciangin tua mun pen Malta tuikulh ahihna thu ka thei uh hi
Tua lai-a teng mite ko tungah hong nuam mahmah uh hi. Guahzu-in khua dam mahmah ahih manin meiphualpi hong cihsak uh a, limtakin zin hong do uh hi
Paul in singkang pawlkhat khawmin meipi tungah hong koih a, a mei sa sa ahih manin gul khat hong taikhia-in Paul' khut a vial hi

Tua lai-a teng mite in Paul' khuttunga gul kivial a muh uh ciangin, “Hih mipa pen mi that hi takpi ding hi. Hih tuipi lauhuai panin a suahtak hangin a thuman pasian in hingsak tuanlo ding hi,” ci-in khatlekhat a kikum uh hi
Ahi zongin Paul in meikhuk sungah tua gul singkhia a, bangmah a ci kei hi

Paul pen a ci hong bawkgawp ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong hong si-in pukgawp ding hi, ci-in um uh ahih manin a en gige uh hi. Ahi zongin sauveipi enenin, Paul tungah thu lamdang a piang bangmah a muhloh uh ciangin a lungsim uh kikheel a, “Hih mipa pen pasian ahi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi
Tua lai panin a gamlalo mun khatah tua tuikulh hausapa Publias' lo a om hi. Amah in limtakin kote zin hong do a, ni thum sung ama zinin ka om uh hi
Publias' pa cisa nat leh gilsan thuahin cina-in lupna tungah a lum hi. Paul zong ama lupna-ah va pai-in thu ngetsak a, a tungah a khut nga-in a damsak hi
Hih bangin a damsak khit ciangin tua tuikulh tunga om cina dang khempeuh zong hong paipih uh a, Paul in amaute a damsak hi
Amaute in na tampi tak hong pia uh a, teembaw tungah ka tuan'kik uh ciangin lamkala zat ding a kisam khempeuh hong puak uh hi.
Tua lai-ah kha thum ka omkhit uh ciangin Alexandria khua panin a hong pai, tua tuikulh tungah phalbi sung a taam, “Pasian Nih,” lim a kisuang teembaw tungah ka tuang leuleu uh a
Sirakus khua ka tun' uh ciangin tua lai-ah ni thum sung ka taam uh hi
Tua panin pai leuleu-in Regium khua ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin leitaw lam panin huih nun'ding hong kipan a, ni nih sungin Puteoli khua ka tung uh hi
Tua khua-ah thu um mi pawlkhat tawh ka kimu uh a, nipikal khat sung hong taam un, ci-in hong kho uh hi. Tua bang danin Rom khua ka tung uh hi

Rom khua-a om ulenaute in kote' thu na za uh ahih manin pawlkhat in, “Appias Sumbuk,” ciangdong hong dawn uh a, pawlkhat in “Ansai Thumna,” ciang hong ban uh hi. Paul in amaute a muh ciangin Pasian tungah a lungdamna ko a, a lungsim hong nuam mahmah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Rom khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Rom khua ka tun' khit uh ciangin Paul pen ama ututna-ah a om theihna dingin thu kipia a, a taikhak lohna dingin galkap khat bek kicingsak hi

A tun'zawh ni thum khit ciangin Paul in Jew makaite sam a, amaute hong kikhop ciangin amah in, “Ute naute aw, i mipihte tung ahi a, i pu i pate' ngeina tawh kisai-in ahi zongin khialhna bangmah neilo napi-in Jerusalem khua-ah hong kimanin thongah hong kikoih a, Rom kumpite' khutsungah hong ki-ap hi
Kei thu hong sit uh ciangin sihna ka thuakna ding thu bangmah omlo ahih manin hong khahkhia nuam uh hi

Ahi zongin kei hong kikhah ding thu-ah i Jew mipihte a lungkim loh uh ciangin i mipihte tungah mawhsakna ding thu bangmah ka neihloh hangin gam uk kumpipa Sisar tungah a zu ka khan loh hong phamawh hi
Israel mite in a lamet uh mipa' hangin sikkhau khihna thuakin thongkia mi ka suak hi. Hih thute khempeuh note kiangah hong gennuam ka hih manin a hong samsak ka hi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Judea gam panin nangma thu tawh kisai-in lai bangmah ka ngah kei uh a, tua gam panin a hong pai i mipihte tung panin zong nang hong kimawhsakna kam ahi zongin bangmah ka za kei uh hi
Ahi zongin tu-a nangma kipawlna mite' thu pen a koimah peuhah mi khempeuh in gensia uh ahih manin nangma ngaihsutna taktak ka zanuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih manin Paul tawh a kimuhna ding uh a ni khat seh uh a, tua a kiciam ni-un Paul a zintun'na munah Jew mite tampi tak a kikhawm uh hi. Paul in zingsanga kipan nitak dongin amaute tungah Pasian' Ukna thu gentel a, Jesuh' thu man hi, ci-in a uptheihna dingun Moses Thukham leh kamsangte' laigelhte siksanin a gen hi
Pawlkhatte in Paul' thugente um uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in umlo uh hi

Tua ciangin Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsang Isaiah tung tawnin na pu na pate uh tungah a thugen man mahmah hi. Tua a genna-ah, ‘Pai in la, hih mite tungah hih bangin va gen in: Thu na ngaihngaih uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite lungsim mawk a, a bil uh humcip uh a, mitsicip uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le uh, a mit un khua mu ding a, a bil un khua za ding a, a lungsim un thu mu thei ding hi. Tua bang hi leh kei lamah hong kihei ding uh a, keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi, Pasian in ci-in gen hi,’ ci hi,” a cih khit ciangin amaute khatlekhat kithutuak loin a paikhia uh hi
Tua ciangin Paul in, “Tua ahih leh tu-in Gentail mite tungah Pasian' hotkhiatna thu kigen ta ding hi. Amaute in um ding uh hi. Hih thu hoihtakin thei un,” ci-in a thugenna a khum hi
(Paul in hih thu a gen khit ciangin Jew mite khatlekhat kitawng gawpin a ciah uh hi
Paul kum nih sung ama saptawm inn sungah amah bekin om a, ama kiangah a hawh khempeuh tawh thu a kikum hi
Amah in Pasian' Ukna thu, leh Topa Jesuh Khrih' thu, hangtakin a ututin genin a hilh hi.
